sourceName: NOAA/National Weather Service public weather alerts

ACTIVE_ALERTS.label: NOAA/NWS active weather alerts
ACTIVE_ALERTS.sourceName: NOAA/National Weather Service public weather alerts
ACTIVE_ALERTS.sourceNote: NOAA/NWS active alerts endpoint. Positive score means low national active weather-hazard load; negative score means elevated active weather disruption.

HEAT_STRESS.label: NOAA heat stress alerts
HEAT_STRESS.sourceName: NOAA/National Weather Service public weather alerts
HEAT_STRESS.sourceNote: Heat-related alerts can affect cooling demand, power load, crop stress, labor productivity, and livestock/agriculture risk.

COLD_FREEZE_STRESS.label: NOAA cold / freeze alerts
COLD_FREEZE_STRESS.sourceName: NOAA/National Weather Service public weather alerts
COLD_FREEZE_STRESS.sourceNote: Cold/freeze alerts can affect heating demand, natural gas use, crop/freeze risk, and transport conditions.

WINTER_STORM_STRESS.label: NOAA winter storm alerts
WINTER_STORM_STRESS.sourceName: NOAA/National Weather Service public weather alerts
WINTER_STORM_STRESS.sourceNote: Winter storm alerts can affect heating demand, logistics, refinery/transport operations, and broad activity disruptions.

FLOOD_STRESS.label: NOAA flood alerts
FLOOD_STRESS.sourceName: NOAA/National Weather Service public weather alerts
FLOOD_STRESS.sourceNote: Flood alerts can disrupt transport, agriculture, energy infrastructure, and local economic activity.

SEVERE_CONVECTIVE_STRESS.label: NOAA severe storm / tornado alerts
SEVERE_CONVECTIVE_STRESS.sourceName: NOAA/National Weather Service public weather alerts
SEVERE_CONVECTIVE_STRESS.sourceNote: Severe storm/tornado alerts can disrupt logistics, local activity, agriculture, and infrastructure.

TROPICAL_STORM_STRESS.label: NOAA tropical storm / hurricane alerts
TROPICAL_STORM_STRESS.sourceName: NOAA/National Weather Service public weather alerts
TROPICAL_STORM_STRESS.sourceNote: Tropical alerts can affect Gulf energy infrastructure, ports, refined products, insurance losses, and logistics.

FIRE_WEATHER_STRESS.label: NOAA fire weather alerts
FIRE_WEATHER_STRESS.sourceName: NOAA/National Weather Service public weather alerts
FIRE_WEATHER_STRESS.sourceNote: Fire-weather alerts can affect crops, power infrastructure, insurance risk, timber/soft commodities, and regional activity.

DROUGHT_STRESS.label: NOAA drought alerts
DROUGHT_STRESS.sourceName: NOAA/National Weather Service public weather alerts
DROUGHT_STRESS.sourceNote: Drought alerts are direct crop/water stress context when present, but active NWS alert feeds may underrepresent slower drought conditions.

notes: This lane uses NOAA/NWS active public alerts as live weather-hazard context.
It is not a full drought monitor, seasonal forecast, or global weather model feed.
Scores are disruption/context scores, not trade signals.
